@everyone

By popular demand, we're resuming the Surge Event with a 150X higher probability of finding Platinum loot!

 Today at 10am EDT / 14:00 UTC until another Platinum loot is found
 https://sage.staratlas.com/

Silver Loot Surge Event is still happening until 12pm EDT / 16:00 UTC. Good luck!
